hero.subtitle: A private collection of exclusive residences where the sea, the jungle, and design come together.

why.title: The Caribbean's best-kept secret
paragraphs: Tucked away on the Samana peninsula, Las Terrenas keeps the soul of a fishing village with the refinement of an international destination.
Untouched beaches of golden sand, jungle-covered mountains, and a French-Caribbean food scene unlike anywhere else in the country.
Here luxury is not measured in ostentation, but in privacy, nature, and time. Time to do nothing at all, facing an impossibly blue sea.

villas.title: Our Villas
villas.subtitle: Three residences, one standard of excellence.

experiences.title: Experiences
experiences.subtitle: What awaits you beyond the villa.

finalCta.title: Book your stay in Las Terrenas
finalCta.subtitle: Write to us and we'll design the perfect getaway together. No hidden prices, no hassle.
